diagnostics.headline: CS/min 9.2 vs the 7 norm — above the usual level

notes: 🎮 private (offlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-4 into a numbers advantage.
They traded the fight for Fangtooth across the map — we won bodies but gave the objective.
Mr_Meat31 (jungle) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-2 into a numbers advantage.
Xeebs (support) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-2 into a numbers advantage.
We took Fangtooth in the same window — read it as a trade, not a clean loss.
We opened it a 1-body down (4v5) — the numbers were lost before the fight was.
Willy Guggenheim (midlane) was dead — went down 37s earlier, so this was never a full-strength fight.
🎮 private (offlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 2-1 into a numbers advantage.
Their main damage was Neon (39k magical); 3/5 of us itemized magic resist.
Enemy ran 3/5 on or near their meta core.

draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Xeebs (support→jungle).

threats: Heal-stacking: Phase. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — we brought none.
Dive threat on our backline: Serath. Assign peel for the carry and ward the flanks.
synergy: Our engage/CC: Bayle Kingslayer (knockback), Gadget Security Gate (root 1s). Our kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
We have sustain (Steel) — favor the longer fight where our heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Skull Crusher gap-close → Dire Howl slow → Cursed Edge → Kingslayer knockback dash, Berserk at low HP
ourKits.winCondition: engage, drop low into Berserk and out-brawl
ourKits.playWith: follow-up while he commits the dive
ourKits.playAgainst: his Berserk rewards low HP — burst him fully or disengage; anti-heal helps

ourKits.combo: Rushing Beat dashes → Line Tempo wolves → Circle Rhythm shield → All-Kill! wolfpack ult
ourKits.winCondition: stack Track and unleash All-Kill! in a grouped fight
ourKits.playAgainst: spread vs the wolfpack; she's squishy without her shield up

ourKits.combo: Security Gate root → Sticky Mine → Tesla Dome zone ult
ourKits.winCondition: root with the gate and trap a fight inside the Tesla Dome
ourKits.passive: FDA stacks grant scaling magical power
ourKits.playWith: frontline that holds enemies in her Dome
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge the gate; spread vs the Dome — she's immobile, dive her

ourKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
ourKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
ourKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
ourKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

enemyKits.combo: Ascend dive → Heaven's Fury multi-strike → Chastise slow → Heresy form ult, resets on takedowns
enemyKits.winCondition: dive the backline and snowball Heresy resets
enemyKits.playWith: a frontline that creates her dive angle
enemyKits.playAgainst: peel the backline — deny the first kill and her resets dry up

enemyKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
enemyKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
enemyKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

enemyKits.combo: Dread Nova stun → Ether Crystal push/lift → Particle Shredder channel → Synaptic Obliterator beams
enemyKits.winCondition: poke from max range and zone with the crystal
enemyKits.playWith: a frontline to protect his stationary channel
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Dread Nova; dive him during the immobile ult channel

enemyKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
enemyKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
enemyKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
enemyKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
enemyKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over the per-event objective+tower stream; itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
